The Knicks are NBA Champions for the first time in 53 years 🏆

Jalen Brunson (45 PTS) and NYK win Game 5 on the road, defeat San Antonio 4-1 in the NBA Finals, and capture their third championship in franchise history!

For the first time since 1973, the Knicks are NBA CHAMPIONS 🏆

items.title: Karl-Anthony Towns on Wemby:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Karl-Anthony Towns on Wemby: 

"He's going to be something special for a lot of years to come.  Once-in-a-generation athlete.

"Shout out to the Spurs, too.  They're the real deal.

"Shout out to Jersey's own, Dylan Harper; he's the real deal."

items.title: Jalen Brunson on the Spurs: “That's a hell of a group. That's a well-coached (team). The culture they have is clearly evident. They have it. And so a lot of respect to them and what they brought to the table. I'm just happy were able to find ways to win four games."
items.author: Tom Orsborn

items.title: MJ. BRUNSON. THAT'S THE LIST. 🔥
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
MJ. BRUNSON. THAT'S THE LIST. 🔥

Jalen Brunson tied Michael Jordan (Game 6, 1998) for the MOST points (45) on the road in an NBA Finals-clinching game!

The NBA Finals MVP delivered a HISTORIC performance to bring the Knicks their first championship in 53 years. 🏆

items.title: Knicks coach Mike Brown on Jalen Brunson: “He’s a top-3 MVP candidate. Everybody kind of mentions his name in passing. They don’t do it seriously enough. People say he’s too small. People say he’s a 1B or a 2B. He’s a freaking 1A. He’s an MVP candidate. He is him.”
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Knicks coach Mike Brown on Jalen Brunson: “He’s a top-3 MVP candidate. Everybody kind of mentions his name in passing. They don’t do it seriously enough. People say he’s too small. People say he’s a 1B or a 2B. He’s a freaking 1A. He’s an MVP candidate. He is him.”
